---
id: create-custom-access-link
title: "Create a custom access link for an installable artifact"
description: "Creates a shareable custom access link for the given installable artifact."

api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Creates a custom access link for an installable artifact"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/installable-artifacts/{installable_artifact_id}/custom-access-links"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a shareable custom access link for the given installable artifact.
